---
title: "Brazil's National Bioindustry Strategy"
date: 2023-01-01
description: "Leading the design of Brazil's strategic framework for the green and bio-based economy, including bioeconomy industrial policy, bioproducts regulation, and international partnerships."
categories: [Green Economy, Industrial Policy]
---

As Director of the Department of Bioindustry within the Secretariat for Green Economy, Decarbonization and Bioindustry (Ministry of Development, Industry, Commerce and Services), I coordinate the development and implementation of Brazil's national strategy for the bioindustry sector.

This includes policy design for bioproducts, sustainable biomaterials, and the integration of biodiversity-based value chains into industrial development. The work bridges environmental sustainability goals with economic competitiveness, aiming to position Brazil as a global leader in the bio-based economy.
